headline: Global central banks brace for ’holding pattern’ as energy volatility bites
summary: Investing.com -- A synchronized wave of central bank interest rate decisions is set to dominate the global financial calendar this week, with policymakers across the G-7 widely expected to maintain their current borrowing costs.
